app.tagline: David Schubert — UI/UX design & web development

hero.headline: Digital brand experiences
hero.intro: A dependable design and development studio committed to growing your business. Got a project in mind? Let’s talk!

about.title: Design meets engineering
about.p1: I’m David — a UI/UX designer and full-stack developer from concept to operations. I build digital products where design and engineering come from one hand: clear interfaces, clean architecture, measurable impact.
about.p2: I’m currently building a multi-site platform on Nuxt 4 and Appwrite that composes sites like this one — dashboard, realtime and its own control plane included.

contact.title: Got a project in mind? Let’s talk.
